title: Total Screen Time (daily/weekly)
description: Baseline attention load; trend over time.

title: Screen Time by category
description: Social vs productivity vs entertainment distribution.

title: Top apps by usage time
description: Top 5/10 apps drive habit loops.

title: Pickups count
description: Compulsion/habit proxy.

title: Notifications total/day
description: Interruption pressure.

title: Notifications by app
description: Identify top interrupters.

title: Reaction Mode score
description: Derived from notifications + pickups + short sessions.

title: Deep Work probability
description: Low pickups + long uninterrupted intervals.

title: First unlock time vs planned wake
description: Routine integrity marker.

title: Late-night pickups
description: Sleep sabotage risk indicator.

title: First app opened after wake
description: Dopamine-hook fingerprint.

title: Downtime configuration & adherence
description: Self-control boundary compliance.

title: App Limit hits
description: Which apps trigger limits and when.

title: Distraction Index
description: (pickups/hr) × (notifications/hr).

title: Screen-distance/strain alerts (if enabled)
description: Potential eye strain / posture marker.

title: Attention fragmentation
description: Count of short sessions (<2 min).

title: Context-switch proxy
description: Approx from Screen Time session segmentation.

title: Notification burst events
description: 10+ notifications in 5 minutes as stressors.

title: Protect-sleep compliance
description: No pickups after cutoff time.

title: Weekly habit drift
description: Week-over-week category shift.

title: Sleep duration
description: Nightly sleep totals from Health/Vitals.

title: Overnight heart rate
description: Baseline/outliers while asleep.

title: Respiratory rate
description: Recovery/illness signal.

title: Wrist temperature deviation
description: Outlier detection vs baseline.

title: Blood oxygen (if supported)
description: Respiration proxy.

title: HRV trend
description: Nervous system load indicator.

title: Resting HR trend
description: Overtraining/illness hints.

title: Steps & active minutes
description: Movement baseline.

title: Workouts: type + duration
description: Training inputs and load.

title: Recovery Debt
description: Sleep shortfall + HRV down + outliers up.

title: Overtraining suspicion
description: High load + HRV suppression pattern.

title: Vitals outlier count
description: Single readiness flag for the morning.

title: Medication/health confound tags (manual)
description: Tag alcohol, meds, illness to explain outliers.

title: Energy forecast
description: Next-day energy from 7-day patterns.

title: Illness onset detector
description: Temp deviation + RHR up + sleep disruption.

title: Health data change handling
description: HealthKit data can be edited/deleted; respect updates.

title: Automated Health export pipeline
description: Optional: export HealthKit to JSON/REST for local DB.

title: Sleep regularity score
description: Bedtime variance across 14 days.

title: Work capacity estimate
description: Recovery state × schedule load.

title: Health vs output correlation
description: Identify conditions that produce your best work.

title: Calendar event count/day
description: Meeting density indicator.

title: Scheduled hours/day
description: Overcommitment detection.

title: Same-day new events
description: Volatility score for schedule churn.

title: Plan adherence
description: Calendar focus blocks vs reaction signals.

title: Reminders completion rate
description: Execution reliability.

title: Delay patterns
description: Postponements/overdue accumulation.

title: Decision debt
description: Reschedules + overdue tasks + late nights.

title: Focus Mode schedule as intent
description: Focus schedule is explicit intent signal.

title: Intent/Outcome delta
description: From AM/MID/PM check-ins vs actual day summary.

title: Travel blocks inferred
description: Location state changes + calendar windows.

title: Buffer deficit
description: Scheduled hours – protected time budget.

title: Meeting spillover score
description: Late events + notification/pickup spikes.

title: Time-to-first-work after wake
description: Routine stability / ramp time.

title: Weekly rhythm profile
description: Peak output days from patterns.

title: Seasonal behavior drift
description: Long-horizon aggregate changes.

title: Significant location changes
description: Coarse context shift without GPS trails.

title: Place-type fingerprint
description: Home/work/else classification from location states.

title: Commute load proxy
description: Travel time + pickups during transit.

title: Car Bluetooth connection events
description: Drive-mode detection.

title: Wi‑Fi SSID change (hashed)
description: Coarse place changes; store hashes only.

title: BLE device proximity counts (non-ID)
description: Density proxy; store counts/strength bands only.

title: Social density estimate
description: RF node count + speech_presence label.

title: Weather/daylight context (external API)
description: Interpret energy/sleep variations.

title: Outdoor exposure proxy
description: Light/daylight minutes or outdoor time proxies.

title: Noise band labels
description: Quiet/moderate/loud derived locally (no content).

title: Speech present labels
description: Boolean presence only (no transcript stored).

title: Interruption bursts
description: Noise spikes per hour.

title: Silence blocks
description: Minutes/hour of silence for deep work.

title: Environment class
description: Home/office/car/outdoor inferred by fusion.

title: Context mismatch flag
description: Trying to focus in loud/social environment.

title: Call count + duration (metadata)
description: No content; just volumes and time.

title: Inbound/outbound ratio
description: Reactive vs proactive social posture.

title: Top contact hashes
description: Pattern-only relationship intensity.

title: Email sent/received counts
description: Via metadata export or Graph (least privilege).

title: Email response latency (median)
description: Time-to-reply metric.

title: After-hours email activity
description: Burnout marker.

title: Messaging volume trend (counts)
description: Counts only, no content stored.

title: Reply latency trend (metadata)
description: From export timestamps where available.

title: Comms load score
description: Calls + email + messages + notifications.

title: Social saturation flag
description: High social load + low recovery = risk.

title: Meeting vs messaging substitution
description: Meetings drop while messaging spikes.

title: VIP cadence
description: Contact frequency bands (hashed).

title: Least privilege for API access
description: Use delegated permissions and scoping.

title: Communication friction index
description: Interruptions × response obligations.

title: Comms vs output correlation
description: Quantify communication tax.

title: Daily spend total (exports)
description: Read-only transaction totals.

title: Spend by category (enriched)
description: Prefer enrichment; MCC alone is weak.

title: Subscription detection
description: Recurring charge identification.

title: Burn rate vs output
description: Runway lens and efficiency.

title: No screen scraping for banking
description: Avoid credentials sharing; export/read-only only.

title: Digital footprint themes
description: Domain/topic clusters, avoid raw query retention.

title: Learning index
description: Reading/research domains vs entertainment.

title: Router/DNS aggregates you control
description: High-level browsing aggregates (privacy-safe).

title: Security posture events (manual)
description: 2FA prompts/unusual logins as user-noted events.

title: Place fingerprint via Wi‑Fi hash
description: Routine drift detection without identity.

title: Routine stability score
description: Place fingerprints + sleep regularity.

title: Anomaly day detector
description: Outlier combo across health+attention+mobility.

title: Shortcuts as event emitters
description: Automations emit structured NCL events.

title: Personal machine autopilot proposals
description: NCL proposes system tweaks on anomalies.

title: Symbiosis metric
description: % days NCL predicted drift early and corrected course.

title: NFC tag rituals
description: Use iPhone NFC automation tags at key locations (desk, gym bag) to emit NCL state transitions.

title: Focus Filter deltas as “role shifts”
description: Treat Focus Filters (work/personal) toggles as explicit mode changes; log every switch.

title: Live Activity interaction counts
description: Use Live Activities (timers, rides, deliveries) as micro-commitments; log start/stop & frequency.

title: Lock-screen widget taps (self-reported)
description: Use a minimal NCL widget and log taps as “check-in impulses” without storing content.

title: Home Screen page/habit mapping (manual)
description: Track which page you open first after wake; map page to intent (work vs leisure).

title: Ringer/Silent state as social availability
description: Ringer on = open to interruptions; silent = protect focus; log transitions and durations.

title: AirPods in-ear + transparency mode events
description: Use headphone connection and transparency/noise control states as attention and environment proxies.

title: CarPlay connect/disconnect
description: Use CarPlay events to mark commute segments and reduce false productivity attributions.

title: Battery “low power mode” as scarcity trigger
description: Low Power Mode toggles correlate with survival-mode behavior; treat as state transition.

title: Charging geography (where you charge)
description: Identify recurring charge locations (bedside/desk/car) to infer routines and boundaries.

title: Device temperature/thermal warnings (if surfaced)
description: Thermal events can indicate heavy compute, hot environments, or prolonged use; log as stressors.

title: Camera “usage event” without media retention
description: Log camera app open/close counts (not photos/videos) as environment documentation impulses.

title: Microphone permission prompts as “privacy tension”
description: Log when apps request mic access; treat as governance events for audit review.

title: Clipboard access prompts as “risk markers”
description: If iOS shows clipboard access prompts, log the app/time as potential privacy risk event.

title: App privacy report snapshots (manual)
description: Periodically export iOS app privacy report (if used) and ingest counts of network/permission use.

title: Keyboard language switches as cognitive context
description: Switching keyboard languages can indicate role/context shifts; log as a high-level marker.

title: Dictation usage frequency
description: Increased dictation may correlate with mobility or fatigue; log dictation activation counts.

title: Shortcuts “voice note to JSON” pipeline
description: Use a Shortcut that captures a voice note, immediately extracts only metadata/tags, then deletes audio.

title: “Arrive/Leave” geofence automations
description: Use geofence automations (home, office, school) to timestamp context shifts without GPS trails.

title: Bluetooth device class presence
description: Log categories of nearby connected devices (car, headset, watch) as context without device IDs.

title: Wi‑Fi “captive portal” events
description: Captive portal prompts mark travel/public spaces; log as environment transitions.

title: Signal strength bands (cell/Wi‑Fi) as friction
description: Low signal correlates with user frustration and delays; log signal band changes (coarse).

title: Do Not Disturb bypass events
description: When someone bypasses DND, log the event as high priority social interruption (no identity stored).

title: Notification summary scheduling as discipline
description: Use notification summary windows as commitment boundaries; log adherence and breakages.

title: Screen brightness pattern (manual/auto changes)
description: Sudden brightness changes can indicate moving indoors/outdoors; log brightness band changes.

title: Rotation lock toggles as activity proxy
description: Rotation lock changes can correlate with reading vs movement; log toggles.

title: Accessibility toggles as stress signal
description: VoiceOver/Zoom/Reduce White Point toggles can reflect fatigue or environment; log toggles if used.

title: Emergency alerts / severe weather notifications
description: Treat public alert notifications as exogenous shocks; tag timeline automatically.

title: Shazam / music ID usage
description: Music-ID usage can correlate with leisure/outings; log events as social context markers.

title: Wallet boarding passes & transit cards (metadata)
description: Log presence of boarding pass activation windows (no destinations stored) to mark travel epochs.

title: Apple Pay transaction notifications (metadata only)
description: If bank notifications show amount/category, ingest as finance events without account details.

title: Screen Time “Most pickups app” shift
description: Day-to-day change in most-picked-up app is a strong drift indicator; treat as anomaly.

title: Notification “permission grant moments”
description: Log first-time notification permissions as app adoption/commitment moments.

title: Health “State of Mind” / mindfulness entries (if used)
description: Use mood/mindfulness check-ins as self-report anchors for model calibration.

title: Photos “people/places” counts (local-only, no faces)
description: If allowed, use aggregate counts (photos/day, new locations/day) without storing image content.

title: Daily “screenshot count” as confusion marker
description: High screenshot count can indicate troubleshooting/learning; log count only.

title: Safari Reading List additions (count only)
description: Additions indicate research intent; store domains/categories, not full URLs.

title: Files app “new/edited docs” counts
description: Document creation/edit counts reflect output; store metadata only.

title: App Store update bursts
description: Update bursts can correlate with system maintenance vs avoidance; log occurrences.

title: Calendar “declined events” ratio
description: High decline rate signals overload/boundary setting; log counts.

title: Reminder “snooze” frequency
description: Snooze frequency indicates avoidance or overcommitment; log counts.

title: Typing intensity proxy via 3rd-party keyboard? (avoid content)
description: Only if user opts in: store keystrokes/min aggregate (no characters) via permitted APIs/tools.

title: Sleep Focus activation timing
description: Track Sleep Focus start/end as a strong boundary signal; correlate with late pickups.

title: Workout “route present” boolean
description: If route exists, store only yes/no and duration, not the map.

title: AirDrop usage count
description: AirDrop events indicate collaboration/sharing; store count only.

title: Hotspot tethering on/off
description: Hotspot toggles mark travel/fieldwork; log state changes.

title: VPN on/off events
description: VPN usage indicates security posture or travel/public networks; log toggles.

title: Time-to-respond after notification
description: Estimate “interrupt cost” by measuring delay between notification and screen unlock (coarse).

title: Micro-pauses between pickups
description: High-frequency pickups with micro-pauses indicate anxiety loops; model as compulsion signature.

title: Weekly “signal diet” experiments
description: Run controlled weeks: disable one notification class and measure coherence/output delta.
